tools.name: weather
tools.description: Get current weather for a location

unit.description: Temperature unit: C for Celsius, F for Fahrenheit

action.description: Action to perform: list events or create a new event

tools.name: convert
tools.description: Convert a value between units (length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, etc.)

from_unit.description: Source unit (e.g. km, miles, kg, lbs, C, F)

to_unit.description: Target unit (e.g. km, miles, kg, lbs, C, F)

tools.name: currency
tools.description: Convert an amount between currencies using current exchange rates

from.description: Source currency ISO 4217 code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP, JPY)

to.description: Target currency ISO 4217 code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP, JPY)

tools.name: sql
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against the local database
